allow: PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command ssh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Host "ssh found at: $\($cmd.Source\)" } else { Write-Host "ssh NOT on PATH" })

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; $output = ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -v root@192.168.0.94 exit 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'authentications that can continue|Permission denied|Connection refused|Connection timed out|Host key verification'; $output | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ })

PowerShell($keyPath = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh\\shakti_id_ed25519"; if \(Test-Path $keyPath\) { Write-Host "Key already exists at $keyPath — not overwriting" } else { ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -f $keyPath -N '""' -C "claude-code@$env:COMPUTERNAME" 2>&1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ } })

PowerShell(@\('ssh-copy-id','sshpass','plink','pscp','putty'\) | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Command $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Host "$_`: $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Host "$_`: NOT FOUND" } })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\\.ssh" | Format-Table Name, Length, LastWriteTime -AutoSize | Out-String | Write-Host)

PowerShell($tar = Get-Command tar -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($tar\) { Write-Host "tar: $\($tar.Source\)"; & $tar.Source --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ } } else { Write-Host "tar NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "client:$\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "client:DOWN $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/health" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "server:$\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "server:DOWN $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
